title: [新鮮出爐] 全港最可靠大學排名 (95%連登用家表示讚同)

Source:
https://www.usnews.com/education/best-global-universities/search?region=&country=hong-kong&subject=&name=
https://www.timeshighereducation.com/world-university-rankings/2018/world-ranking#!/page/0/length/25/locations/HK/sort_by/rank/sort_order/asc/cols/scores
https://www.topuniversities.com/university-rankings/world-university-rankings/2018
http://www.education18.com/include/ranking/2016/2016_Appendix_I.pdf
Note 1: Scores are obtained from the newest edition of the four rankings.
Note 2: Schools are arranged by their first and original establishment date.
HKU>UST>ChinU>>CityU>PolyU >BU>LU

由年經變月經變埋依家日經

見到chinU高過CU就知唔可信

呢個真

First, I do not buy into the concept of university ranking at all

I made this comprehensive ranking from four major rankings in Hong Kong as I hate how so many people use one sub-ranking (Aisa) of a ranking to jump to the conclusion that one uni is better than the others.

So now, if you guys wanna to use uni ranking as an argument, please use this Comprehensive University Ranking of Hong Kong (CURHK) proudly made by me
